title: SSO Settings
description: Configure Single Sign-On for your Qarote instance.
statusDescription: Enable or disable SSO authentication for your instance.
protocolDescription: Choose and configure your SSO protocol.
clientSecretPlaceholder: Enter client secret (leave empty to keep current)
urlsDescription: Backend and frontend URLs used for SSO callbacks and redirects.
registerInIdP: Register these URLs in your Identity Provider:
displaySettingsDescription: Customize the SSO login button and tenant configuration.
discoveryUrlRequired: Please enter an OIDC Discovery URL first
deleteConfirm: Delete SSO provider? This will disable SSO for all users.
setupDescription: Configure your SSO provider to enable single sign-on.
domainDescription: The email domain users must belong to, e.g. acme.com
urlsAfterSave: Callback URLs will be available after saving your provider configuration.
